note: Plan-review framing respected this round; no false positives.

issues.title: Tx ownership rule not codified
issues.resolution: Invariant 7 updated: Phase 5 services own; handlers/jobs never open; repos strictly tx-in/tx-out.

action_taken: All 7 fixes applied inline. Plan now has 12 tasks (4.1-4.12). Round 2 skipped — findings enumerable and directly addressed.
